modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to move and renew my PsychData account.

full_description_text:  
I want to move my PsychData account to a new user.  
Also, I need to renew my license.  
Can you help with removing the old license too?  
Thanks!

description:
